title: Ikari Shinji Raising Project PC Game CG Pack
display_title: Ikari Shinji Raising Project PC Game CG Pack
wikitext:
[]: Ikari Shinji Raising Project PC Game CG Pack             Quote Post by ShuTomato » Fri Nov 07, 2008 9:09 pm Game info on Evastore http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=600&genre=&page=&key=%C4%F6%A5%B7%A5%F3%A5%B8%B0%E9%C0%AE%B7%D7%B2%E8&8%A1%E04=2%A1%DE0 I hope this is fine since this game probably won't get licensed. This CG Pack is pretty much complete. It's missing 3 CGs (1 event / 2 extra) and few Kaworu relates ones http://www.megaupload.com/?d=KF1H81NA and don't worry, nothing explict in this set.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 10, 2008 1:08 pm I think this was already done before with collecting the CGs in the game. Thanks anyway though, nice to have this.
